findings.description: The source Form class includes setter methods with validation annotations (@PropertyName, @Required, @SystemChar(charsetDef="AlnumChar")) on setValue1/setValue2/setValue3. These concrete setter-annotation patterns are not shown in the knowledge file code example — only the validateForKeyValue method is included. The annotations are listed in the text description but without code context showing they go on setter methods.
MessageUtil is referenced in the code example (MessageUtil.getStringResource("V0020001")) but is absent from the hints array.
